name: Storm's Fury
description: The Stormrend Accord strikes fast, disrupts everything, and vanishes before retaliation. Eight missions of lightning warfare.

missions.name: First Lightning
missions.briefing: A Bastion patrol has spotted Stormrend raider teams. Strike before they can report back. Plant Flicker Mines along the patrol route as an invisible trap — then engage the patrol from the far side to drive them into the minefield.
objectives: Place Flicker Mines on the patrol route before engaging
Destroy the Bastion patrol
Remain undetected by the main base
missions.twist: Flicker Mines are invisible to the enemy — use them to secure your retreat route and deny Bastion any pursuit after the strike.

missions.name: Blitz Protocol
missions.briefing: Hit Ironmarch's forward logistics before they can dig in. The Ironmarch Signal Truck is already in the field — it will detect Stormrend units the moment they enter range. Destroy it first, then the Flicker Mines will block the reinforcement routes.
objectives: Destroy the Ironmarch Signal Truck before it detects the raiding force
Destroy all Ironmarch FOB Trucks
Lay Flicker Mines on the 2 reinforcement routes
Hit and withdraw before the main Ironmarch force arrives
missions.twist: Ironmarch Juggernauts arrive at the 8-minute mark — be gone before then. The Signal Truck will alert them the moment it detects Stormrend units. Speed and the Flicker Mine screen are the only edge.

missions.name: Counter-Surveillance
missions.briefing: Arcloft drones track every Stormrend movement. Blind them. Arcloft Vigilant jets are detector aircraft — they will spot Stormrend units the instant they fly overhead. Approach from their blind spots, then destroy the Vigilants before pressing on to the relay.
objectives: Identify and destroy the Arcloft Vigilant patrol routes before advancing
Destroy 4 Arcloft Overwatch Drones
Disable the Aether Relay
missions.twist: Arcloft Vigilant jets are detector aircraft — they nullify stealth and make Stormrend's speed advantage irrelevant. Destroy the Vigilants first, then the Overwatch Drones. Once the detection net is down, the relay is undefended.

missions.name: Storm the Beaches
missions.briefing: Stormrend raiders cross the sea to strike Bastion island fortresses. A Riptide Sub will lead the assault — submerged and invisible until the moment of the torpedo strike — before the fast-attack surface fleet charges in.
objectives: Use the Riptide Sub to destroy the Bastion Corvettes before they can detect the surface fleet
Land Stormrend Riptide fast-attack craft
Destroy the island harbour
Withdraw before Kragmore naval reinforcements arrive
missions.twist: Bastion Corvettes and Depth Ward submarines carry stealth-detection sonar — they will spot the Riptide Sub if it ventures close without first neutralising them. Kragmore dreadnoughts arrive in 10 minutes.

missions.name: Surge and Fade
missions.briefing: Kragmore heavy columns are slow. Lead them into a kill zone and destroy them. Pre-position Flicker Mines throughout the canyon before the ambush — invisible to Kragmore since they have no detectors. Destroy the Bastion Watcher towers at the canyon exit first.
objectives: Plant Flicker Mines throughout the canyon kill zone
Destroy the Bastion Watcher towers at the canyon exit
Bait the Kragmore armour columns into the canyon
Keep losses below 30 units
missions.twist: Bastion Watcher towers at the canyon exit will detect the Flicker Mines before they can be armed — destroy all Watcher towers first. Kragmore has no detectors, so the minefield will remain invisible until it triggers.

missions.name: The Three-Way
missions.briefing: Three factions fight for the same resource deposit. Stormrend will take what they need and leave the others fighting over scraps. Deploy a Riptide Sub to secretly seize the underwater Cordite nodes while the surface factions are distracted by each other.
objectives: Use the Riptide Sub to seize underwater Cordite nodes while the surface factions fight
Seize 3 surface Cordite nodes
Avoid triggering a coalition against Stormrend
missions.twist: Arcloft Vigilant jets and Valkyr Overwatch Drones will detect surface Stormrend units — the Riptide Sub is invisible to both. Ironmarch Signal Trucks on the ground will detect surface raiders. Speed is survival — never stop moving on the surface.

missions.name: Tempest Rising
missions.briefing: Stormrend Thunderjaw walkers are ready for their first major deployment. Ring the Thunderjaws with a Flicker Mine defensive perimeter — invisible to Ironmarch ground forces — before rolling them forward through the Bastion citadel wall.
objectives: Lay a Flicker Mine defensive perimeter around the Thunderjaw staging area
Destroy the Ironmarch Signal Truck before it detects the Thunderjaws
Field 3 Thunderjaw walkers
Breach the Bastion citadel wall
Destroy the Command Hub
missions.twist: Ironmarch Signal Trucks can detect Stormrend stealth assets — if the Signal Truck is alive when the Thunderjaws advance, it will immediately reveal their position to all defenders. Escort the Thunderjaws with fast support units and take out the Signal Truck on the way in.

missions.name: The Final Storm
missions.briefing: Arcloft's relay network at Crossroads has been feeding intelligence to all factions. Take it down before the Six Fronts alliance forms.
objectives: Destroy the Arcloft Command Center
missions.twist: Arcloft Vigilants will reveal your Scrap Hawks early — strike fast before their detection grid is fully active.

missions.name: The Six Fronts
missions.briefing: The Cordite Nexus will be taken by the fastest commander in the war. Tempest Kael leads Stormrend to total victory. Riptide Sub seizes the underwater approach while Flicker Mines ring the Nexus perimeter — unseen by every faction that lacks a detector.
objectives: Use the Riptide Sub to approach the Nexus undetected
Be first to destroy the Nexus defence turrets
Lay a Flicker Mine perimeter before other factions arrive
Establish a Refinery on the Nexus before any other faction
Hold for 5 minutes
missions.twist: Arcloft Vigilants, Bastion Patrol Rovers, Valkyr Overwatch Drones, and Ironmarch Signal Trucks will together form a near-complete detection net. The Riptide Sub and Flicker Mine perimeter are the only assets that bypass it — speed plus stealth is Stormrend's total advantage.
